info.title: Hostfully API
info.description: Hostfully Property Management Platform API for managing vacation rental properties, leads/bookings, messages, photos, pricing, and more.

get.description: Retrieve a lead by its UID

patch.description: Partially update a lead by its UID

delete.description: Delete a lead by its UID

post.description: Convert a lead to a booking
Cancel a booking by lead UID

get.description: Retrieve a property by its UID
Retrieve a message by its UID
List all photos for a property

post.description: Upload a photo for a property
Create or modify a pricing period

apiKey.name: X-HOSTFULLY-APIKEY
apiKey.description: API key for direct account access
